memory.title: Coach memory
memory.desc: Things your coach should remember for future chats, like recurring injuries, training preferences, schedule constraints, or important corrections. Markdown headings like "## Schedule" or "## Injury history" are welcome. This is saved to your account, used in AI coach requests, and editable any time.
memory.footer: We only save the AI suggestions you choose to store in your <link>AI Coach conversations</link>.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.shareDesc: Limited app analytics and crash diagnostics. No run data, routes, heart-rate samples, or coach messages are ever sent.
privacy.crashNote: If the app crashes, you'll still be asked before any crash report is sent.

backup.title: Backup & restore
backup.desc: Save a copy of your runs & plan, or reload from a previous backup.
backup.hint: Copy or download — save it to Notes, email, etc. Use Restore to reload it after any update.

restore.title: Restore from Backup
restore.invalidBackup: Doesn't look like a valid backup.
restore.invalidJson: Invalid JSON — make sure you copied the entire backup.

deleteAccount.title: Delete account
deleteAccount.body: This permanently deletes your account and all associated data — runs, GPS routes, training plan, and settings. <bold>This cannot be undone.</bold>
deleteAccount.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or email theo.camboulive.dev@gmail.com.

hr.title: Heart rate
hr.dontKnow: I don't know my heart rate
hr.enterBirthYear: Enter your birth year above to estimate it.
hr.estimated: Estimated from age (Tanaka, 208 − 0.7×age): {{max}} bpm max HR, with a typical 60 bpm resting HR.
hr.fullBreakdown: Full zone breakdown is in Progress → Stats.

hrSensor.pairHelp: Put your sensor in pairing mode (or enable heart-rate broadcast on your watch), then scan. Some watches only broadcast while a workout is active.
hrSensor.scanFailed: Couldn't scan for sensors — make sure Bluetooth is on.
hrSensor.permissionNeeded: Bluetooth permission is needed to pair a sensor.
hrSensor.hcNotSupported: Health Connect isn't supported on this device (needs Android 8+).
hrSensor.hcInstall: Install Health Connect from Google Play, then tap Connect again.
hrSensor.hcOpenFailed: Couldn't open Health Connect. Make sure it's installed and up to date.
hrSensor.hkNotSupported: Apple Health isn't available on this device.
hrSensor.hkDenied: Access wasn't granted. In the Health app, allow Running Coach to read Heart Rate and Workouts.
hrSensor.hkOpenFailed: Couldn't reach Apple Health. Try again, or check the Health app's sharing settings.

connections.title: Connections & sync
connections.subtitle: Sensors, watches and accounts that add runs and heart rate automatically.

store.hrToggleDesc: Fills in your heart rate once a run ends.
store.watchToggleDesc: Offers finished watch workouts as runs to import.

mobile.title: Sensors & watch sync
mobile.desc: Heart-rate capture and watch sync live in the mobile app.

connections.betaNote: These connections are new and lightly tested. Pairing, live readings or imports may fail or arrive late, so check the saved heart rate before training by it.

help.oneHrSource: One heart-rate source at a time: turning one on switches the other off.
help.hrEditable: Imported values stay editable on every run.

hrDisclosure.title: Connect a heart-rate sensor
hrDisclosure.warning: Heart-rate capture is new and not yet battle-tested. Readings can be delayed, missing, or wrong if your sensor/watch drops out.
hrDisclosure.intro: To read your heart rate during a run, Running Coach connects to a nearby <bold>Bluetooth heart-rate sensor</bold> — a chest strap, an armband, or a watch broadcasting its heart rate.
hrDisclosure.bullet1: Bluetooth is used <bold>only to find and read your sensor</bold> — never for location.
hrDisclosure.bullet2: Your heart rate is saved on your run, in your own account.
hrDisclosure.bullet3: Nothing is sold or shared with third parties.
hrDisclosure.policy: See our <link>Privacy Policy</link>. When you tap Allow, Android will ask to use nearby Bluetooth devices.

integrations.connectSuccess: Connected — your watch runs will appear here after they sync.
integrations.noNewRuns: No new runs to import yet.
integrations.accessDenied: Access wasn't granted. Allow Running Coach to read Exercise, Distance, Elevation and Heart rate.
integrations.connectFailed: Couldn't connect. Make sure Health Connect is installed and up to date.
integrations.noRuns30: No new runs found in the last 30 days.

healthconnect.label: Your watch (Health Connect)
healthconnect.help: Works with any watch whose app writes workouts to Health Connect (Android 14+): Garmin Connect (Settings → Health Connect) or Zepp/Amazfit (Profile → 3rd-party access → Health Connect). Runs appear a few minutes after your watch syncs; no route/map is included.

healthkit.label: Your watch (Apple Health)
healthkit.help: Works with the Apple Watch Workout app and any watch whose companion app writes workouts to Apple Health (Garmin Connect, Polar Flow, Zepp…). Runs appear a few minutes after your watch syncs; no route/map is included.

polar.label: Polar
polar.help: Connect your Polar account to import finished runs — route, pace, elevation and heart rate — from your Polar watch, even when you leave your phone at home.
